s1.title: 1. Agreement to Terms
s1.p1: These Terms of Use constitute a legally binding agreement made between you, whether personally or on behalf of an entity (“you”) and MONEA (“we”, “us”, or “our”), concerning your access to and use of our website as well as any other media form, media channel, mobile website or mobile application related, linked, or otherwise connected thereto (collectively, the “Site”).

s2.title: 2. Intellectual Property Rights
s2.p1: Unless otherwise indicated, the Site is our proprietary property and all source code, databases, functionality, software, website designs, audio, video, text, photographs, and graphics on the Site (collectively, the “Content”) and the trademarks, service marks, and logos contained therein (the “Marks”) are owned or controlled by us or licensed to us, and are protected by copyright and trademark laws and various other intellectual property rights and unfair competition laws.

s3.title: 3. User Representations
s3.p1: By using the Site, you represent and warrant that:
items: all registration information you submit will be true, accurate, current, and complete;
you will maintain the accuracy of such information and promptly update such registration information as necessary;
you have the legal capacity and you agree to comply with these Terms of Use;
you are not a minor in the jurisdiction in which you reside;
you will not access the Site through automated or non-human means, whether through a bot, script or otherwise;
you will not use the Site for any illegal or unauthorized purpose; and
your use of the Site will not violate any applicable law or regulation.

s4.title: 4. User Registration
s4.p1: You may be required to register with the Site. You agree to keep your password confidential and will be responsible for all use of your account and password. We reserve the right to remove, reclaim, or change a username you select if we determine, in our sole discretion, that such username is inappropriate, obscene, or otherwise objectionable.

s5.title: 5. Prohibited Activities
s5.p1: You may not access or use the Site for any purpose other than that for which we make the Site available. The Site may not be used in connection with any commercial endeavors except those that are specifically endorsed or approved by us.
s5.p2: As a user of the Site, you agree not to:
items: Systematically retrieve data or other content from the Site to create or compile, directly or indirectly, a collection, compilation, database, or directory without written permission from us.
Trick, defraud, or mislead us and other users, especially in any attempt to learn sensitive account information such as user passwords.
Circumvent, disable, or otherwise interfere with security-related features of the Site.
Disparage, tarnish, or otherwise harm, in our opinion, us and/or the Site.
Use any information obtained from the Site in order to harass, abuse, or harm another person.

s6.title: 6. Modifications and Interruptions
s6.p1: We reserve the right to change, modify, or remove the contents of the Site at any time or for any reason at our sole discretion without notice. However, we have no obligation to update any information on our Site. We also reserve the right to modify or discontinue all or part of the Site without notice at any time. We will not be liable to you or any third party for any modification, price change, suspension, or discontinuance of the Site.

s1.title: 1. Introduction
s1.p1: Welcome to MONEA (“we”, “our”, or “us”). We respect your privacy and are committed to protecting your personal data. This privacy policy will inform you as to how we look after your personal data when you visit our website (regardless of where you visit it from) and tell you about your privacy rights and how the law protects you.

s2.title: 2. The Data We Collect About You
s2.p1: Personal data, or personal information, means any information about an individual from which that person can be identified. We may collect, use, store and transfer different kinds of personal data about you which we have grouped together as follows:
items: Identity Data includes first name, last name, username or similar identifier.
Contact Data includes email address and telephone numbers.
Technical Data includes internet protocol (IP) address, your login data, browser type and version, time zone setting and location.
Profile Data includes your username and password, purchases or orders made by you, your interests, feedback and survey responses.
Event Data includes details about events (e.g., weddings) you create using our platform, including guest lists and event details.

s3.title: 3. How We Use Your Personal Data
s3.p1: We will only use your personal data when the law allows us to. Most commonly, we will use your personal data in the following circumstances:
items: Where we need to perform the contract we are about to enter into or have entered into with you (e.g., providing our digital invitation services).
Where it is necessary for our legitimate interests (or those of a third party) and your interests and fundamental rights do not override those interests.
Where we need to comply with a legal obligation.

s4.title: 4. Data Security
s4.p1: We have put in place appropriate security measures to prevent your personal data from being accidentally lost, used or accessed in an unauthorized way, altered or disclosed. In addition, we limit access to your personal data to those employees, agents, contractors and other third parties who have a business need to know. They will only process your personal data on our instructions and they are subject to a duty of confidentiality.

s5.title: 5. Data Retention
s5.p1: We will only retain your personal data for as long as reasonably necessary to fulfill the purposes we collected it for, including for the purposes of satisfying any legal, regulatory, tax, accounting or reporting requirements. We may retain your personal data for a longer period in the event of a complaint or if we reasonably believe there is a prospect of litigation in respect to our relationship with you.

s6.title: 6. Your Legal Rights
s6.p1: Under certain circumstances, you have rights under data protection laws in relation to your personal data, including the right to:
items: Request access to your personal data.
Request correction of your personal data.
Request erasure of your personal data.
Object to processing of your personal data.
Request restriction of processing your personal data.
Request transfer of your personal data.
Right to withdraw consent.

s7.title: 7. Contact Us
s7.p1: If you have any questions about this privacy policy or our privacy practices, please contact us at:

features.title: What MONEA Offers
features.subtitle: A complete digital system designed to make your wedding planning effortless and modern.
features.card1Desc: Exquisite, modern, and highly customizable templates that create a lasting impression for your guests.
features.card2Desc: Track attendance, organize tables, and manage responses effortlessly in one centralized system.
features.card3Desc: Securely link your bank account so guests can send digital gifts and blessings with a quick QR scan.
features.card4Desc: Integrated Google Maps ensures your guests can navigate to your venue seamlessly.
features.howSubtitle: Just 4 simple steps to your exquisite digital invitation.
features.step1Desc: Create a free account and start your wedding project in minutes.
features.step2Desc: Browse our collection of stunning templates and customize them to your style.
features.step3Desc: Input guest details, event schedule, and location coordinates.
features.step4Desc: Send your invitation link to guests and await their responses.

testimonials.title: Real Impressions
testimonials.t1Text: MONEA is so easy to use! Our guests loved the modern look of our invitations. Managing the guest list has never been this simple.
testimonials.t2Text: The QR gift feature is my favorite. It's secure and convenient for guests who couldn't attend in person. Saved us so much time!
testimonials.t3Text: Beautiful templates with so many options. Quick setup and very professional. I highly recommend it to all new couples!

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: Can I edit my invitation after sending it?
faq.a1: Yes! You can update your date, location, or time anytime. The guest link will update automatically.
faq.q2: How secure is the Digital Gift (QR) feature?
faq.a2: It is highly secure. We simply display your direct bank QR code. Transactions occur directly between the guest's bank app and yours; MONEA does not process the funds.
faq.q3: How long is the Free package valid?
faq.a3: The free package allows you to test core features for 2 weeks with a guest limit of up to 50 people.
faq.q4: Can I add background music to my invitation?
faq.a4: Yes, Pro and Business plans allow you to select or upload romantic background music for your invitations.

cta.description: Join hundreds of happy couples who chose MONEA to make their special day even more unforgettable.
